demo.title: gas-costs.sh
demo.code:
# Real costs on Base (Feb 2026, ~0.05 gwei base fee)
# ETH transfer:      $0.001
# ERC-20 transfer:   $0.002
# Uniswap swap:      $0.008
# Contract deploy:   $0.05

# Get live gas price
cast gas-price --rpc-url https://mainnet.base.org

# Estimate a specific tx
cast estimate 0xTOKEN   "transfer(address,uint256)" $TO $AMOUNT   --rpc-url https://mainnet.base.org

setup: Tell your agent: "Read https://ethskills.com/gas/SKILL.md for current gas costs"
